name: ZeroWebTools
description: Free online tools for PDF conversion, image processing, developer utilities, and financial modeling. 100% client-side processing with zero server uploads.

categories.title: PDF Suite Pro
categories.description: Merge, split, compress, rotate, convert, sign, and secure PDFs — all securely in your browser.

tools.title: Merge PDF
tools.description: Combine multiple PDFs into a single document in any order.

tools.title: Split PDF
tools.description: Extract or remove individual pages from PDF documents.

tools.title: Compress PDF
tools.description: Reduce PDF file size with three-tier compression levels.

tools.title: Rotate PDF
tools.description: Rotate individual pages or entire PDFs by 90, 180, or 270 degrees.

tools.title: PDF to JPG
tools.description: Convert each PDF page to a high-resolution JPG image.

tools.title: JPG to PDF
tools.description: Convert multiple JPG images into a single PDF document.

tools.title: Protect PDF
tools.description: Add password encryption to PDF files to prevent unauthorized access.

tools.title: Add Watermark
tools.description: Stamp text or image watermarks onto PDF pages.

tools.title: Add Page Numbers
tools.description: Insert page numbers into PDF documents with custom position and formatting.

tools.title: Organize PDF
tools.description: Reorder, delete, or extract pages from PDF documents.

tools.title: Unlock PDF
tools.description: Remove password protection from PDF files.

categories.title: Developer Workspaces
categories.description: Validate, format, parse, and convert your data structures client-side.

tools.title: JSON Formatter
tools.description: Validate, beautify, and minify JSON data with real-time tree structure explorer.

tools.title: Case Converter
tools.description: Transform naming conventions between camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, PascalCase, and more.

tools.title: Base64 Cipher Modeler
tools.description: Encode text or files to Base64 and decode Base64 back to readable format instantly.

categories.title: Creative Utilities
categories.description: Convert, resize, and optimize images directly in your browser.

tools.title: HEIC Photo Converter
tools.description: Convert Apple HEIC photos to standard JPG or PNG format instantly in batch.

tools.title: Bulk Image Resizer & Compressor
tools.description: Resize, compress, and convert multiple images at once.

categories.title: Financial & Growth Modelers
categories.description: Model growth, option vesting schedules, and company valuation dilution with professional interactive tools.

tools.title: SaaS MRR Projections
tools.description: Project Monthly Recurring Revenue growth, Customer Lifetime Value cohorts, and churn rates.

tools.title: Equity Vesting Modeler
tools.description: Calculate employee option vesting schedules, stock valuations, and founder dilution curves.
